# Transcrição: 3.4_Can_Setters_Turn_Into_Closers

- **Fonte:** 3.4_Can_Setters_Turn_Into_Closers
- **Duração:** 01:14

---

## [00:00 - 01:14]

Quickly, let's talk about can setters turn into closers. Some people are like, hey, I got this great setter. Should I keep him a setter? Or should I move him into a closer? What should I do? Well, I think at the end of the day, the answer is yes. But they have to earn it. Your mindset should be, I'm just going to put the best players in the field at all costs. So if a setter develops into having a closer level ability, then make them a closer. Now, also realize that many setters, despite doing really, really well, just don't have this kind of closer DNA. So they're great at setting, but it's not going to transfer well over into closing. For these folks, it's better to move them into a setter lead position, where they're a player coach. And they're still setting, but they're also doing the onboarding and the training and really helping you kind of manage your other setters as well, which for your company, they can make a ton of money. I mean, sometimes setter leads can make more than closers, so that's also really positive. And it's going to make you a lot more money as well. So consider that option. But I think they can turn into it. But I would also consider moving them into that setter lead position. And we'll talk about leads and sales coordinators when we get into the management stuff. So that's it for this training, guys. We'll see you in the next training.
